title: aster hirsutus
intro: Aster hirsutus, also known as hairy aster or rough-leaved aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to its saponin, flavonoid, and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Aster hirsutus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Aster hirsutus can be infused as a tea, dried as a powder, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
